mapper.sql: select coupon_id, coupon_name, coupon_type, scope_type, product_ids_json, min_amount, discount_amount, bonus_principal, bonus_rate, experience_principal, min_experience_units, max_experience_units, valid_days, total_count, received_count, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sys_coupon_template
mapper.insert: insert into sys_coupon_template(coupon_name, coupon_type, scope_type, product_ids_json, min_amount, discount_amount, bonus_principal, bonus_rate, experience_principal, min_experience_units, max_experience_units, valid_days, total_count, received_count, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{couponName}, #{couponType}, #{scopeType}, #{productIdsJson}, #{minAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{bonusPrincipal}, #{bonusRate}, #{experiencePrincipal}, #{minExperienceUnits}, #{maxExperienceUnits}, #{validDays}, #{totalCount}, #{receivedCount}, #{status}, #{createBy}, now(), #{remark})
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_coupon_template where coupon_id in
#{couponId}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_coupon_user(coupon_id, user_id, user_name, grant_type, status, start_time, end_time, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{couponId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{grantType}, '0', now(), date_add(now(), interval #{validDays} day), #{operator}, now(), #{remark})
